creator: filis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 254158
error messages from py-openai-whisper

I'm not sure, if this is the right place, but trying to run py-openai-whisper on an mp3 file, I get loads of those errors. I attached the whole output. They all say "Failed to initialize cpuinfo!"
I don't know if this is related to the hardware, but the CPU info from dmesg is
CPU: AMD EPYC 9454P 48-Core Processor (2750.15-MHz K8-class CPU)
